projectDescription: Gardener automates the management and operation of homogeneous Kubernetes clusters at scale across any infrastructure using hosted control planes and a Kubernetes-native extensibility framework.
keyFeatures: Kubernetes-native cluster management using hosted control planes (k8s-in-k8s pattern)
Multi-cloud and multi-infrastructure support via an extensible provider model
Automated cluster lifecycle management including creation, upgrades, and deletion
Homogeneous clusters with identical configuration across all supported infrastructures
Gardenlet agent for decentralized seed cluster management and reversed control flow
Gardener Operator for self-hosted garden environment management
High-availability shoot cluster control planes with automated failover
Extensible architecture supporting custom providers, DNS, networking, and OS configs
Kubernetes conformance certified across major cloud providers
Built-in monitoring, logging, backup/restore, and etcd management
publicApiSurface: core.gardener.cloud/v1beta1: Shoot, Seed, CloudProfile, Project, SecretBinding, BackupBucket, BackupEntry
extensions.gardener.cloud/v1alpha1: Infrastructure, Worker, ControlPlane, Network, OperatingSystemConfig, DNSRecord, Bastion
gardenadm CLI: init, join, token, status
Gardenlet TLS bootstrapping and seed registration API
Extension registration via ControllerRegistration and ControllerDeployment resources
